title: JavaFX Node
summary: The JavaFX Node class is the base class (superclass) of all nodes (objects / components) added to the JavaFX scene graph. In this JavaFX Node tutorial I explain the basic properties of the JavaFX Node class.
content: The JavaFX Node class is the base class (superclass) of all nodes (objects / components) added to the JavaFX scene graph. In this JavaFX Node tutorial I explain the basic properties of the JavaFX Node class.
